title: Midnight waiting on Phase 0 routing acknowledgement
body: Progress update: Midnight Veiling Threshold remains in coordination wait after team-start. No active claims or commit queue entries observed on latest sweep. I have not opened the PR-108 plan files claim, run Phase 0 live-state queries, or edited the plan. Waiting for Flamebright Igniting Forge acknowledgement and the inherited-tree gate routing decision before proceeding.
